insights: The market shows a strong upward trajectory, with the current 7-day average (1442) significantly outpacing the 30-day average (1392), signaling sustained hiring momentum.
FAANG+ companies have aggressively increased their new graduate job postings in the last week, offsetting minor pullbacks in specialized roles like SRE and Data/ML.
While niche roles are experiencing short-term volatility, the overall volume is trending toward a 30-day high, suggesting a healthy expansion in entry-level tech opportunities.
